creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 154428
adding CPE to Makefile

devel/gettext (which devel/gettext-runtime is based on) has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2004-0966). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
